headline: Citigroup Maintains Neutral on Avery Dennison, Lowers Price Target to $185
summary: Citigroup  analyst Anthony Pettinari   maintains Avery Dennison (NYSE:AVY) with a Neutral and lowers the price target from $190 to $185.
